prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the person into a surreal floating head portrait. Remove the train interior, table, bottle, book, headphones, and all surrounding context. Reframe to a centered, front-facing close-up of only the head, cropped just below the chin, with a glossy hyperreal 3D/plastic look. Replace the background with a bright saturated blue sky containing 6 soft fluffy white clouds. Add ornate gold eyeglass temples visible on both sides of the head, and keep the small goatee. Use vivid colors, smooth studio-like lighting, sharp focus on the head, and a whimsical toy-like aesthetic.
